study_title: Subnational immunisation coverage gaps and structural determinants in Ghana: ecological equity mapping and an interpretable district risk index across 261 districts
affiliations: Ghana COCOBOD Cocoa Clinic, Accra; University of Cape Coast (PhD candidate)
primary_result: Logistic regression AUC 0.82; 180/261 (69.0%) districts below target
top_finding_1: Immunisation gaps concentrate in a contiguous northern high-vulnerability cluster (Moran's I 0.72)
top_finding_2: Logistic regression (AUC 0.82) outperformed RF (0.54) and XGBoost (0.46) under leave-one-region-out validation
